title: EnderSMP Recipes
description: A recipes mod for EnderSMP, attempting to replace some of the Create: Automated mods.
body:
# EnderSMP Recipes

A recipes mod for EnderSMP, attempting to replace some of the Create: Automated mods.
This mod is made for EnderSMP, but you can download it to replace some mods that just take up some pesky loading time.
### THIS MOD REQUIRES CREATE!

Updates every, once and a while.
